song.title: Wandering
song.author: (Last 4 lines based on a quote by J.N. Darby)
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E B7 When You appeared O Lord, .A B7 Called me unto You. .C#m G#m Your glory filled my heart, .A B Made me wholly new. .E B7 No earthly ties now hold; .A I count them loss. . E Though I’m a stranger here, . B7 E With joy I bear the cross.
[C] .E B7 Oh the joy of having nothing, .C#m G#m Being nothing, Seeing nothing, .A E But a living Christ in glory, . A B And being careful for nothing. .E B7 Oh the joy of having nothing, .C#m G#m Being nothing, Seeing nothing, .A E But a living Christ in glory .A B7 E And His interest here on earth.
